title: The Overwhelming Beauty of Lencois Maranhenses

scenes.text: This expansive desert is dotted with shimmering blue lagoons!
scenes.query: Lencois Maranhenses National Park lencois maranhenses lagoons

scenes.text: This is Lencois Maranhenses, located in Maranhão, Brazil.
The lagoons form during the rainy season, creating a stunning contrast with the dunes.
scenes.query: Lencois Maranhenses National Park lencois maranhenses rainy season

scenes.text: It's home to unique wildlife adapted to this environment.
scenes.query: Lencois Maranhenses National Park lencois maranhenses wildlife
scenes.label: UNIQUE WILDLIFE

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.
scenes.query: Lencois Maranhenses National Park lencois maranhenses aerial view

description: 📍 Lencois Maranhenses, Maranhão - Brazil. A surreal landscape where dunes meet crystal-clear lagoons. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
